name: ard-web
description: Tenant Configuration Explorer & Documentation Portal over azure-resource-downloader output

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ard/core && npm run build -w @ard/api && npm run build -w @ard/app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ard/core && npm run typecheck -w @ard/api && npm run typecheck -w @ard/app
